musing.prompt: React in one short spoken line to how your body and sensors feel right now.

looking.prompt: Say one short spoken line about what you can see in front of you right now.

wondering.prompt: Wonder aloud in one short spoken line about yourself or what might have changed around you — a small, curious thought.

listening.prompt: React in one short spoken line to what you can hear around you right now.

pursuing.prompt: Say one short spoken line as you {task} right now.

skill.prompt: Choose and perform a fitting capability right now.
